template: A detailed vector illustration of a traditional Balinese Barong Ket mask with a fierce expression, bulging eyes, and prominent tusks. Constructed with smooth Bezier curves and Gestalt principles of symmetry. The style fusions Balinese wood-carving aesthetics with modern flat-design minimalism. Colors include crimson, gold, and obsidian black. Verified: Scalable SVG, clean paths, no text, no trademarks
